final_answer:
Yes, we are working on Gilt Chain, but tomorrow should be treated as a roughnet/test launch unless every gate below passes today.

Why it matters: the repo contains chain, bridge/contracts, DEX, scanner, site, genesis tooling, and a heavily dirty worktree. Launching without clearing those gates risks shipping broken branding, wrong addresses, unsafe bridge assumptions, or unverified validator/reward behavior.

**Today’s Checklist**
- [ ] Freeze scope: decide `roughnet/testnet` vs real public launch.
- [ ] Clean release state: review dirty worktree before any release; current repo has many modified files under `bridge/gilt-consensus` and large scanner rename/delete state.
- [ ] Chain build: run `make build` in `bridge/gilt-consensus`.
- [ ] Chain tests: run `go test ./... -count=1` or `make test` in `bridge/gilt-consensus`.
- [ ] Execution build: run `make geth` or `make all` in `gilt-chain` or the chosen execution client path.
- [ ] Execution tests: run the execution-client unit test gate.
- [ ] Genesis: lock final chain ID, network name, validator set, premine, gas token, `GILT`, `GOLD`, governance, and system contract addresses.
- [ ] Validator keys: confirm validator keys, BLS keys, node keys, peer enodes, backups, and no secrets are committed.
- [ ] Staking: verify `GILT` validator join, `GOLD` delegation, undelegation, reward allocation, and `PriceFeed` manual price snapshot flow.
- [ ] Governance: verify governance authority can update staking params and `PriceFeed` adapter schedule/activation.
- [ ] Bridge contracts: deploy/test Ethereum-side vault and chain-side bridge contracts only after final addresses and confirmation policy are locked.
- [ ] Bridge relayer: verify finalized-event policy, nonce replay protection, relayer threshold, and deposit/redemption test flows.
- [ ] DEX contracts: deploy wrapper contracts `wGILT`/`wGOLD`, factory, router, pools, farms, and write final deployment JSON.
- [ ] DEX frontend: update chain ID, RPC, explorer, router, factory, `wGOLD`, `wGILT`, token list, farms, and branding.
- [ ] DEX price path: set the initial `PriceFeed` to `manual`; only switch to `dex_twap` after the chosen DEX adapter is implemented and tested.
- [ ] Scanner backend: build and run `scan/goldscan` against the live RPC/WS endpoints.
- [ ] Scanner frontend: build and run `scan/goldscan-frontend` with Gold Chain branding, chain ID `714` if roughnet, `GILT` currency, and correct RPC/explorer URLs.
- [ ] Site: build `giltchain-site` and confirm all links point to the launched chain, DEX, scanner, bridge, docs, and faucet.
- [ ] Faucet: prepare funded faucet wallets for `GILT` and any test `GOLD`.
- [ ] Branding: replace leftover upstream names/logos across chain docs, DEX UI, scanner UI, site, metadata, token lists, and env files.
- [ ] Smoke test: send `GILT`, deploy ERC20, mint/transfer, wrap `GOLD`, swap `GOLD/GILT`, delegate `GOLD`, claim/observe rewards, and verify all transactions in scanner.
- [ ] Monitoring: enable logs, RPC health checks, block height monitoring, validator liveness, disk alerts, bridge relayer alerts, and scanner indexing lag alerts.
- [ ] Release artifacts: tag commit, build binaries/images, record contract addresses, record genesis hash, record validator set, and store deployment JSONs.
- [ ] Go/no-go: launch only if chain produces blocks, scanner indexes, DEX swaps, bridge test flow, staking/reward flow, and branding all pass.

What should be done next: split work into five focused tracks today: chain/genesis, bridge/contracts, DEX, scanner/site branding, and final smoke tests. Do not call it launch-ready until each track has a named passing gate.
prompt: Alright, we're all working on Gilt Chain isn't it? I want to ask you one thing: if I were to launch, what is the checklist that we need to do before launch? That's all I need to know from you at this point. Give me a checklist so I can finish it today, and then we can launch tomorrow. The whole thing is we might need to launch all the things inside this directory (the chain, the bridge, the text, and the scanner) with our branding, and we might have to have sub-agents or different chats here to finish those. So, have a look through the files, read-only task, and then give me a checklist, please.
